SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.smtp.webhook

Interface WebhookCallerInterface

All Known Implementing Classes:
WebhookCaller
public interface WebhookCallerInterface
Interface for webhook caller implementations.

Allows custom webhook handling via Factories.setWebhookCaller().

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    WebhookResponse
    call(WebhookConfig config, Connection connection, Verb verb)
    Calls webhook with connection and verb data.
    WebhookResponse
    callRaw(WebhookConfig config, String filePath, Connection connection)
    Calls RAW webhook with email content as text/plain.
    String
    extractSmtpResponse(String body)
    Extracts SMTP response from webhook response body.

  • Method Details

    • call

      WebhookResponse call(WebhookConfig config, Connection connection, Verb verb)
      Calls webhook with connection and verb data.
      Parameters:
      config - Webhook configuration.
      connection - Connection instance.
      verb - Verb instance.
      Returns:
      WebhookResponse.

    • callRaw

      WebhookResponse callRaw(WebhookConfig config, String filePath, Connection connection)
      Calls RAW webhook with email content as text/plain.
      Parameters:
      config - Webhook configuration.
      filePath - Path to email file.
      connection - Connection instance.
      Returns:
      WebhookResponse.

    • extractSmtpResponse

      String extractSmtpResponse(String body)
      Extracts SMTP response from webhook response body.
      Parameters:
      body - Response body.
      Returns:
      SMTP response string or null.
